§6PaA Battle Hazmat§f

§aEndgame radiation protection with proper combat stats.§f

Full PaA Alloy Plate construction. 10 defense, RR 1.7 total.
Less radiation protection than Liquidator but far better in combat — no speed penalty and higher durability.

§eTip§f: Requires PaA alloy from the PaA processing line. Worth rushing for late-game exploration in hot zones.
